title: geonoma undata subsp. dussiana
intro: Geonoma undata subsp. dussiana, also known as the Dussiana geonoma palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Geonoma undata subsp. dussiana include its potential to help manage fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application to treat skin irritations and infections.
